title: Logotype
summary: The most distinct part of our visual identity is the SEB emblem. It telegraphically communicates and connects SEB to a piece of communication, a building, a service, or a digital product.

sections.title: Usage
sections.section-content:
The SEB emblem can be used in white or black.

We use the version that creates the highest contrast for increased legibility in both digital and physical environments and makes sure that the brand is presented as clearly as possible.

If you have any questions or need assistance, please contact [creativedirection@seb.se](mailto:creativedirection@seb.se)

sections.title: Good examples
sections.section-content: Here follows a few good examples of how to place the logotype and when to use which version of it.

columns.title: Placement
columns.content:
When placing the logo, disregard the lines and follow the baseline and height of the SEB letters.

Also consider how the S and B protrudes slightly from the visual frame of the logo for maximum balance – this is only noticable when working with larger sized logos.

columns.caption: Primary  – Our primary placement of the logotype is in the bottom right corner. We use our logo to sign off the material – our signature.  If possible, try to place the logo to create a perfect square of margin in the lower right corner.

Secondary  – Placing our logo in the upper right corner creates a header. This is when we're presenting a document or for front pages of booklets end brochures.  Try to place the logo to define the square of margin in the upper right corner.
Centered  – Placing the logo big and boldly centered on top can be used when brand recognition is important in high noise environments.  This placement is mainly used digital and outdoor advertising.

columns.title: Clear space
columns.content: When placing the logo close to other elements, it's important to keep a clear space around the logo. The minimum clear space around the wordmark is the wordmarks height.

columns.title: Minimum size
columns.content:
To ensure that our company name SEB is always visible, and stands as a clear sender of our brand, a minimum size has been set.

• For print, the minimum size is 10 mm wide.  
• For digital, the minimum size is 60 px wide.

The logotype should never be used in smaller sizes.
